# zstack_directory (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage directories in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the directory.
- `type` (String) The type of the directory.
- `zone_uuid` (String) The zone UUID.

### Optional

- `parent_uuid` (String) The parent directory UUID.

### Read-Only

- `group_name` (String) The group name of the directory.
- `root_directory_uuid` (String) The root directory UUID.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the directory.
